name: Tiny Dino
short_description: TINY DINO is an idle nurturing game where little dinosaurs accompany you at the bottom of your screen while you work or study. They produce gems for you to earn profits, and you can plant trees and build structures to create a free and lively world for them, growing together with you.
detailed_description:
《Tiny Dino》 is an idle nurturing game located at the bottom of your screen, accompanying you while you work or study.

They will spit out gems to earn you profits, and you can also plant trees or build structures to let them live freely, growing alongside you.

Collect Different Types of Dinos

Grass, Fire, Water attributes, and more—dinos of different attributes come in unique colors.

Build your vibrant dino legion!

Battle Other Players

Your dinos will automatically fight opponents based on your team setup!

Raise the Strongest Dino Team

Each dino has its own strengths—assemble the ultimate team!

Interact with Your Dinos

You can pick them up anytime, feed them, or pet them—they’ll chase after food!

Nurture New Life

Try to raise the most unique dinos!

Build Your Dino Homeland

Plant trees, construct buildings! Free your hands and let them thrive!

supported_languages: English, Russian, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, French, German
